typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	var_BCC as string (),
	var_CC as string (),
	var_Data_Src as string (),
	var_Dest_Conn as string (),
	var_Dim_MaxSK as integer (),
	var_Dim_Query as string (),
	var_Duplicate_Rec as string (),
	var_Dw_Effective_End_Date as timestamp (),
	var_Dw_Run_Cncl_Dt as timestamp (),
	var_Dw_Run_Eff_Dt as timestamp (),
	var_Dw_Run_Key as integer (),
	var_Dw_Run_Month as integer (),
	var_Email_From as string (),
	var_Email_Subject as string (),
	var_Email_To as string (),
	var_Error_Description as string (),
	var_Error_Flag as integer (),
	var_Initial_Catalog as string (),
	var_Initial_Catalog1 as string (),
	var_Password as string (),
	var_ProjectID as integer (),
	var_SMTP_Server as string (),
	var_User_Name as string ()
}

source(output(
		ID as integer,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		ProjectBillingTypeID as integer,
		ProjectTechnologyID as integer,
		CurrentStageID as integer,
		GeographyID as integer,
		ProjectType as string,
		AccountManager as string,
		AccountManagerName as string,
		CustomerLocationCountry as string,
		CustomerLocationState as string,
		OnsiteCoordinator as string,
		ProjectBillingType as string,
		InitialProjectEstimate as string,
		ProjectTechnology as string,
		CustomerName as string,
		CurrentStage as string,
		DeliveryManager as string,
		ProjectName as string,
		ProjectTechnologyDomain as string,
		StateID as integer,
		VicePresident as string,
		BusinessDomainID as integer,
		ProjectManager as string,
		ProjectID as integer,
		Modified as timestamp,
		Created as timestamp,
		ProjectContractType as string,
		BusinessDomain as string,
		hrPODProjectID as integer,
		HRPODProjectName as string,
		ProjectContractTypeID as integer,
		IsSubProject as string,
		CustomerID as integer,
		ProjectTypeID as integer,
		SrProjectManager as string,
		SrPMName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select X.[ID],X.[DW_Run_Key],X.[DW_Upsert_Flag],X.[ProjectBillingTypeID],X.[ProjectTechnologyID],X.[CurrentStageID],X.[GeographyID],X.[ProjectType],X.[AccountManager],X.[AccountManagerName],X.[CustomerLocationCountry],X.[CustomerLocationState],X.[OnsiteCoordinator],X.[ProjectBillingType],X.[InitialProjectEstimate],X.[ProjectTechnology],X.[CustomerName],X.[CurrentStage],X.[DeliveryManager],X.[ProjectExecution],X.[ProjectName],X.[ProjectTechnologyDomain],X.[ProjectBusinessDomain],X.[StateID],X.[VicePresident],X.[BusinessDomainID],X.[ProjectManager],X.[ProjectID],X.[Modified] from Src.stg_Projects X where DW_Run_Key=370 union select X.[ID],X.[DW_Run_Key],X.[DW_Upsert_Flag],X.[ProjectBillingTypeID],X.[ProjectTechnologyID],X.[CurrentStageID],X.[GeographyID],X.[ProjectType],X.[AccountManager],X.[AccountManagerName],X.[CustomerLocationCountry],X.[CustomerLocationState],X.[OnsiteCoordinator],X.[ProjectBillingType],X.[InitialProjectEstimate],X.[ProjectTechnology],X.[CustomerName],X.[CurrentStage],X.[DeliveryManager],X.[ProjectExecution],X.[ProjectName],X.[ProjectTechnologyDomain],X.[ProjectBusinessDomain],X.[StateID],X.[VicePresident],X.[BusinessDomainID],X.[ProjectManager],X.[ProjectID],X.[Modified] from (select *,ROW_NUMBER()over(partition by projectid order by modified desc) Rank_Project from Src.stg_Projects where DW_Run_Key<=370 and [GeographyID] in (select [GeographyID] from DW.D_Geography where DW_Run_Key=370)) X where X.Rank_Project=1 union select X.[ID],X.[DW_Run_Key],X.[DW_Upsert_Flag],X.[ProjectBillingTypeID],X.[ProjectTechnologyID],X.[CurrentStageID],X.[GeographyID],X.[ProjectType],X.[AccountManager],X.[AccountManagerName],X.[CustomerLocationCountry],X.[CustomerLocationState],X.[OnsiteCoordinator],X.[ProjectBillingType],X.[InitialProjectEstimate],X.[ProjectTechnology],X.[CustomerName],X.[CurrentStage],X.[DeliveryManager],X.[ProjectExecution],X.[ProjectName],X.[ProjectTechnologyDomain],X.[ProjectBusinessDomain],X.[StateID],X.[VicePresident],X.[BusinessDomainID],X.[ProjectManager],X.[ProjectID],X.[Modified] from (select *,ROW_NUMBER()over(partition by projectid order by modified desc) Rank_Project from Src.stg_Projects mt where DW_Run_Key<=370 and [CurrentStageID] in(select [CurrentStageID] from DW.D_CurrentStages where DW_Run_Key=370 ))X where X.Rank_Project=1 union select X.[ID],X.[DW_Run_Key],X.[DW_Upsert_Flag],X.[ProjectBillingTypeID],X.[ProjectTechnologyID],X.[CurrentStageID],X.[GeographyID],X.[ProjectType],X.[AccountManager],X.[AccountManagerName],X.[CustomerLocationCountry],X.[CustomerLocationState],X.[OnsiteCoordinator],X.[ProjectBillingType],X.[InitialProjectEstimate],X.[ProjectTechnology],X.[CustomerName],X.[CurrentStage],X.[DeliveryManager],X.[ProjectExecution],X.[ProjectName],X.[ProjectTechnologyDomain],X.[ProjectBusinessDomain],X.[StateID],X.[VicePresident],X.[BusinessDomainID],X.[ProjectManager],X.[ProjectID],X.[Modified] from (select *,ROW_NUMBER()over(partition by projectid order by modified desc) Rank_Project from Src.stg_Projects mt where DW_Run_Key<=370 and [ProjectTechnologyID] in(select [ProjectTechnologyID] from DW.D_ProjectTechnology where DW_Run_Key=370))X where X.Rank_Project=1 union select X.[ID],X.[DW_Run_Key],X.[DW_Upsert_Flag],X.[ProjectBillingTypeID],X.[ProjectTechnologyID],X.[CurrentStageID],X.[GeographyID],X.[ProjectType],X.[AccountManager],X.[AccountManagerName],X.[CustomerLocationCountry],X.[CustomerLocationState],X.[OnsiteCoordinator],X.[ProjectBillingType],X.[InitialProjectEstimate],X.[ProjectTechnology],X.[CustomerName],X.[CurrentStage],X.[DeliveryManager],X.[ProjectExecution],X.[ProjectName],X.[ProjectTechnologyDomain],X.[ProjectBusinessDomain],X.[StateID],X.[VicePresident],X.[BusinessDomainID],X.[ProjectManager],X.[ProjectID],X.[Modified] from (select *,ROW_NUMBER()over(partition by projectid order by modified desc) Rank_Project from Src.stg_Projects mt where DW_Run_Key<=370 and [ProjectBillingTypeID] in (select [ProjectBillingTypeID] from DW.D_ProjectBillingType where DW_Run_Key=370))X where X.Rank_Project=1 union select X.[ID],X.[DW_Run_Key],X.[DW_Upsert_Flag],X.[ProjectBillingTypeID],X.[ProjectTechnologyID],X.[CurrentStageID],X.[GeographyID],X.[ProjectType],X.[AccountManager],X.[AccountManagerName],X.[CustomerLocationCountry],X.[CustomerLocationState],X.[OnsiteCoordinator],X.[ProjectBillingType],X.[InitialProjectEstimate],X.[ProjectTechnology],X.[CustomerName],X.[CurrentStage],X.[DeliveryManager],X.[ProjectExecution],X.[ProjectName],X.[ProjectTechnologyDomain],X.[ProjectBusinessDomain],X.[StateID],X.[VicePresident],X.[BusinessDomainID],X.[ProjectManager],X.[ProjectID],X.[Modified] from (select *,ROW_NUMBER()over(partition by projectid order by modified desc) Rank_Project from Src.stg_Projects mt where DW_Run_Key<=370 and [ProjectTechnologyDomain] in (select [ProjectTechnologyDomain] from DW.D_ProjectTechnologyDomain where DW_Run_Key=370))X where X.Rank_Project=1 union select X.[ID],X.[DW_Run_Key],X.[DW_Upsert_Flag],X.[ProjectBillingTypeID],X.[ProjectTechnologyID],X.[CurrentStageID],X.[GeographyID],X.[ProjectType],X.[AccountManager],X.[AccountManagerName],X.[CustomerLocationCountry],X.[CustomerLocationState],X.[OnsiteCoordinator],X.[ProjectBillingType],X.[InitialProjectEstimate],X.[ProjectTechnology],X.[CustomerName],X.[CurrentStage],X.[DeliveryManager],X.[ProjectExecution],X.[ProjectName],X.[ProjectTechnologyDomain],X.[ProjectBusinessDomain],X.[StateID],X.[VicePresident],X.[BusinessDomainID],X.[ProjectManager],X.[ProjectID],X.[Modified] from (select *,ROW_NUMBER()over(partition by projectid order by modified desc) Rank_Project from Src.stg_Projects mt where DW_Run_Key<=370 and [ProjectManager] in (select LoginName from DW.D_CompanyResources where DW_Run_Key=370))X where X.Rank_Project=1 union select X.[ID],X.[DW_Run_Key],X.[DW_Upsert_Flag],X.[ProjectBillingTypeID],X.[ProjectTechnologyID],X.[CurrentStageID],X.[GeographyID],X.[ProjectType],X.[AccountManager],X.[AccountManagerName],X.[CustomerLocationCountry],X.[CustomerLocationState],X.[OnsiteCoordinator],X.[ProjectBillingType],X.[InitialProjectEstimate],X.[ProjectTechnology],X.[CustomerName],X.[CurrentStage],X.[DeliveryManager],X.[ProjectExecution],X.[ProjectName],X.[ProjectTechnologyDomain],X.[ProjectBusinessDomain],X.[StateID],X.[VicePresident],X.[BusinessDomainID],X.[ProjectManager],X.[ProjectID],X.[Modified] from (select *,ROW_NUMBER()over(partition by projectid order by modified desc) Rank_Project from Src.stg_Projects mt where DW_Run_Key<=370 and [AccountManager] in (select LoginName from DW.D_CompanyResources where DW_Run_Key=370))X where X.Rank_Project=1 union select X.[ID],X.[DW_Run_Key],X.[DW_Upsert_Flag],X.[ProjectBillingTypeID],X.[ProjectTechnologyID],X.[CurrentStageID],X.[GeographyID],X.[ProjectType],X.[AccountManager],X.[AccountManagerName],X.[CustomerLocationCountry],X.[CustomerLocationState],X.[OnsiteCoordinator],X.[ProjectBillingType],X.[InitialProjectEstimate],X.[ProjectTechnology],X.[CustomerName],X.[CurrentStage],X.[DeliveryManager],X.[ProjectExecution],X.[ProjectName],X.[ProjectTechnologyDomain],X.[ProjectBusinessDomain],X.[StateID],X.[VicePresident],X.[BusinessDomainID],X.[ProjectManager],X.[ProjectID],X.[Modified] from (select *,ROW_NUMBER()over(partition by projectid order by modified desc) Rank_Project from Src.stg_Projects mt where DW_Run_Key<=370 and [OnsiteCoordinator] in (select CompanyResourceName from DW.D_CompanyResources where DW_Run_Key=370))X where X.Rank_Project=1 union select X.[ID],X.[DW_Run_Key],X.[DW_Upsert_Flag],X.[ProjectBillingTypeID],X.[ProjectTechnologyID],X.[CurrentStageID],X.[GeographyID],X.[ProjectType],X.[AccountManager],X.[AccountManagerName],X.[CustomerLocationCountry],X.[CustomerLocationState],X.[OnsiteCoordinator],X.[ProjectBillingType],X.[InitialProjectEstimate],X.[ProjectTechnology],X.[CustomerName],X.[CurrentStage],X.[DeliveryManager],X.[ProjectExecution],X.[ProjectName],X.[ProjectTechnologyDomain],X.[ProjectBusinessDomain],X.[StateID],X.[VicePresident],X.[BusinessDomainID],X.[ProjectManager],X.[ProjectID],X.[Modified] from (select *,ROW_NUMBER()over(partition by projectid order by modified desc) Rank_Project from Src.stg_Projects mt where DW_Run_Key<=370 and [DeliveryManager] in (select LoginName from DW.D_CompanyResources where DW_Run_Key=370 ))X where X.Rank_Project=1 union select X.[ID],X.[DW_Run_Key],X.[DW_Upsert_Flag],X.[ProjectBillingTypeID],X.[ProjectTechnologyID],X.[CurrentStageID],X.[GeographyID],X.[ProjectType],X.[AccountManager],X.[AccountManagerName],X.[CustomerLocationCountry],X.[CustomerLocationState],X.[OnsiteCoordinator],X.[ProjectBillingType],X.[InitialProjectEstimate],X.[ProjectTechnology],X.[CustomerName],X.[CurrentStage],X.[DeliveryManager],X.[ProjectExecution],X.[ProjectName],X.[ProjectTechnologyDomain],X.[ProjectBusinessDomain],X.[StateID],X.[VicePresident],X.[BusinessDomainID],X.[ProjectManager],X.[ProjectID],X.[Modified] from (select *,ROW_NUMBER()over(partition by projectid order by modified desc) Rank_Project from Src.stg_Projects mt where DW_Run_Key<=370 and [VicePresident] in (select LoginName from DW.D_CompanyResources where DW_Run_Key=370))X where X.Rank_Project=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLESRCProjects	source(output(
		CompanyResourceSk as integer,
		LoginName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select CompanyResourceSk,lower(ltrim(rtrim(LoginName))) LoginName from  dw.D_CompanyResources where dw_current_flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPCompanyResourcesAMLKPTABLE	source(output(
		CompanyResourceSk as integer,
		LoginName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select CompanyResourceSk,lower(ltrim(rtrim(LoginName))) LoginName  from  dw.D_CompanyResources where dw_current_flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPCompanyResourcesDMLKPTABLE	source(output(
		CompanyResourceSk as integer,
		CompanyResourceName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select CompanyResourceSk,lower(ltrim(rtrim(CompanyResourceName))) CompanyResourceName from  dw.D_CompanyResources where dw_current_flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPCompanyResourcesOCLKPTABLE	source(output(
		CompanyResourceSk as integer,
		LoginName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select CompanyResourceSk,lower(ltrim(rtrim(LoginName))) LoginName  from  dw.D_CompanyResources where dw_current_flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPCompanyResourcesPMLKPTABLE	source(output(
		CompanyResourceSk as integer,
		LoginName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select CompanyResourceSk,lower(ltrim(rtrim(LoginName))) LoginName  from  dw.D_CompanyResources where dw_current_flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPCompanyResourcesVPLKPTABLE	source(output(
		CurrentStageSK as integer,
		CurrentStageID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select CurrentStageSK, CurrentStageID from dw.D_CurrentStages where dw_current_flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPCurrentStagesLKPTABLE	source(output(
		GeographySK as integer,
		GeographyID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select GeographySK, GeographyID from dw.D_Geography where dw_current_flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPGeographyLKPTABLE	source(output(
		ProjectSK as integer,
		ProjectID as integer,
		ProjectTitle as string,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date as timestamp,
		DW_Effective_End_Date as timestamp,
		DW_Create_Datetime as timestamp,
		DW_Update_Datetime as timestamp,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		DW_Update_Run_key as integer,
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		DW_Current_Flag as integer,
		ProjectGeographySK as integer,
		ProjectCurrentStageSK as integer,
		ProjectTechnologySK as integer,
		ProjectBillingTypeSK as integer,
		ProjectsProjectManagerSK as integer,
		ProjectsAccountManagerNameSK as integer,
		ProjectOnSiteCoordinatorSK as integer,
		ProjectVicePrecidentSK as integer,
		projectDeliveryManagerSK as integer,
		ProjectsCustomerName as string,
		CEO1LoginName as string,
		CEO2LoginName as string,
		ProjectTechnologyDomainSK as integer,
		ProjectContractType as string,
		ProjectType as string,
		IsSubProject as string,
		CustomerID as integer,
		hrPODProjectID as integer,
		ProjectTypeID as integer,
		ProjectContractTypeID as integer,
		HRPODProjectName as string,
		SrProjectManager as string,
		SrPMName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from dw.D_projects where DW_Current_Flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPProjectLKPTABLE	source(output(
		ProjectBillingTypeSK as integer,
		ProjectBillingTypeID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select ProjectBillingTypeSK, ProjectBillingTypeID  from dw.D_ProjectBillingType where dw_current_flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPProjectBillingTypeLKPTABLE	source(output(
		ProjectTechnologyDomainSK as integer,
		ProjectTechnologyDomain as string,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date as timestamp,
		DW_Effective_End_Date as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select ProjectTechnologyDomainSK,lower(ltrim(rtrim(ProjectTechnologyDomain))) ProjectTechnologyDomain, DW_Effective_Begin_Date, DW_Effective_End_Date from  dw.D_ProjectTechnologyDomain where dw_current_flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPProjectTechnologogyDomainLKPTABLE	source(output(
		ProjectTechnologySK as integer,
		ProjectTechnologyID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select ProjectTechnologySK, ProjectTechnologyID  from dw.D_ProjectTechnology where dw_current_flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPProjectTechnologyLKPTABLE
OLESRCProjects derive(Modified_Begin_Date = Modified,
		Modified_End_Date = Modified) ~> DERModifiedDate
LKPProjectLKPTABLE select(mapColumn(
		ProjectSK = ProjectSK,
		ProjectID_newRenamed = ProjectID,
		ProjectTitle = ProjectTitle,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date = DW_Effective_Begin_Date,
		DW_Effective_End_Date = DW_Effective_End_Date,
		DW_Create_Datetime = DW_Create_Datetime,
		DW_Update_Datetime = DW_Update_Datetime,
		DW_Run_Key_newRenamed = DW_Run_Key,
		DW_Update_Run_key = DW_Update_Run_key,
		DW_Upsert_Flag_newRenamed = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		DW_Current_Flag = DW_Current_Flag,
		ProjectGeographySK = ProjectGeographySK,
		ProjectCurrentStageSK = ProjectCurrentStageSK,
		ProjectTechnologySK_newRenamed = ProjectTechnologySK,
		ProjectBillingTypeSK_newRenamed = ProjectBillingTypeSK,
		ProjectsProjectManagerSK = ProjectsProjectManagerSK,
		ProjectsAccountManagerNameSK = ProjectsAccountManagerNameSK,
		ProjectOnSiteCoordinatorSK = ProjectOnSiteCoordinatorSK,
		ProjectVicePrecidentSK = ProjectVicePrecidentSK,
		projectDeliveryManagerSK = projectDeliveryManagerSK,
		ProjectsCustomerName = ProjectsCustomerName,
		CEO1LoginName = CEO1LoginName,
		CEO2LoginName = CEO2LoginName,
		ProjectTechnologyDomainSK_newRenamed = ProjectTechnologyDomainSK,
		ProjectContractType_newRenamed = ProjectContractType,
		ProjectType_newRenamed = ProjectType,
		IsSubProject_newRenamed = IsSubProject,
		CustomerID_newRenamed = CustomerID,
		hrPODProjectID_newRenamed = hrPODProjectID,
		ProjectTypeID_newRenamed = ProjectTypeID,
		ProjectContractTypeID_newRenamed = ProjectContractTypeID,
		HRPODProjectName_newRenamed = HRPODProjectName,
		SrProjectManager_newRenamed = SrProjectManager,
		SrPMName_newRenamed = SrPMName
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPProjectLKPTABLEREFORMAT
DERModifiedDate,LKPGeographyLKPTABLE lookup(StateID == LKPGeographyLKPTABLE@GeographyID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPGeography
LKPGeography select(mapColumn(
		Modified_Begin_Date = Modified_Begin_Date,
		Modified_End_Date = Modified_End_Date,
		ID = ID,
		DW_Run_Key = DW_Run_Key,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		ProjectBillingTypeID = ProjectBillingTypeID,
		ProjectTechnologyID = ProjectTechnologyID,
		CurrentStageID = CurrentStageID,
		GeographyID = OLESRCProjects@GeographyID,
		ProjectType = ProjectType,
		AccountManager = AccountManager,
		AccountManagerName = AccountManagerName,
		CustomerLocationCountry = CustomerLocationCountry,
		CustomerLocationState = CustomerLocationState,
		OnsiteCoordinator = OnsiteCoordinator,
		ProjectBillingType = ProjectBillingType,
		InitialProjectEstimate = InitialProjectEstimate,
		ProjectTechnology = ProjectTechnology,
		CustomerName = CustomerName,
		CurrentStage = CurrentStage,
		DeliveryManager = DeliveryManager,
		ProjectName = ProjectName,
		ProjectTechnologyDomain = ProjectTechnologyDomain,
		StateID = StateID,
		VicePresident = VicePresident,
		BusinessDomainID = BusinessDomainID,
		ProjectManager = ProjectManager,
		ProjectID = ProjectID,
		Modified = Modified,
		Created = Created,
		ProjectContractType = ProjectContractType,
		BusinessDomain = BusinessDomain,
		hrPODProjectID = hrPODProjectID,
		HRPODProjectName = HRPODProjectName,
		ProjectContractTypeID = ProjectContractTypeID,
		IsSubProject = IsSubProject,
		CustomerID = CustomerID,
		ProjectTypeID = ProjectTypeID,
		SrProjectManager = SrProjectManager,
		SrPMName = SrPMName,
		{} = {},
		GeographySK = GeographySK
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPGeographySelect
LKPGeographySelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPGeographyIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPGeographyIsMatch@Match,LKPCurrentStagesLKPTABLE lookup(LKPGeographyIsMatch@Match@CurrentStageID == LKPCurrentStagesLKPTABLE@CurrentStageID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPCurrentStages
LKPCurrentStages select(mapColumn(
		GeographySK = GeographySK,
		Modified_Begin_Date = Modified_Begin_Date,
		Modified_End_Date = Modified_End_Date,
		ID = ID,
		DW_Run_Key = DW_Run_Key,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		ProjectBillingTypeID = ProjectBillingTypeID,
		ProjectTechnologyID = ProjectTechnologyID,
		CurrentStageID = LKPCurrentStagesLKPTABLE@CurrentStageID,
		GeographyID = GeographyID,
		ProjectType = ProjectType,
		AccountManager = AccountManager,
		AccountManagerName = AccountManagerName,
		CustomerLocationCountry = CustomerLocationCountry,
		CustomerLocationState = CustomerLocationState,
		OnsiteCoordinator = OnsiteCoordinator,
		ProjectBillingType = ProjectBillingType,
		InitialProjectEstimate = InitialProjectEstimate,
		ProjectTechnology = ProjectTechnology,
		CustomerName = CustomerName,
		CurrentStage = CurrentStage,
		DeliveryManager = DeliveryManager,
		ProjectName = ProjectName,
		ProjectTechnologyDomain = ProjectTechnologyDomain,
		StateID = StateID,
		VicePresident = VicePresident,
		BusinessDomainID = BusinessDomainID,
		ProjectManager = ProjectManager,
		ProjectID = ProjectID,
		Modified = Modified,
		Created = Created,
		ProjectContractType = ProjectContractType,
		BusinessDomain = BusinessDomain,
		hrPODProjectID = hrPODProjectID,
		HRPODProjectName = HRPODProjectName,
		ProjectContractTypeID = ProjectContractTypeID,
		IsSubProject = IsSubProject,
		CustomerID = CustomerID,
		ProjectTypeID = ProjectTypeID,
		SrProjectManager = SrProjectManager,
		SrPMName = SrPMName,
		{} = {},
		CurrentStageSK = CurrentStageSK
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPCurrentStagesSelect
LKPCurrentStagesSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPCurrentStagesIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPCurrentStagesIsMatch@Match,LKPProjectTechnologyLKPTABLE lookup(LKPCurrentStagesIsMatch@Match@ProjectTechnologyID == LKPProjectTechnologyLKPTABLE@ProjectTechnologyID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPProjectTechnology
LKPProjectTechnology select(mapColumn(
		ProjectTechnologySK = ProjectTechnologySK,
		ProjectTechnologyID = LKPProjectTechnologyLKPTABLE@ProjectTechnologyID,
		CurrentStageSK = CurrentStageSK,
		GeographySK = GeographySK,
		Modified_Begin_Date = Modified_Begin_Date,
		Modified_End_Date = Modified_End_Date,
		ID = ID,
		DW_Run_Key = DW_Run_Key,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		ProjectBillingTypeID = ProjectBillingTypeID,
		CurrentStageID = CurrentStageID,
		GeographyID = GeographyID,
		ProjectType = ProjectType,
		AccountManager = AccountManager,
		AccountManagerName = AccountManagerName,
		CustomerLocationCountry = CustomerLocationCountry,
		CustomerLocationState = CustomerLocationState,
		OnsiteCoordinator = OnsiteCoordinator,
		ProjectBillingType = ProjectBillingType,
		InitialProjectEstimate = InitialProjectEstimate,
		ProjectTechnology = ProjectTechnology,
		CustomerName = CustomerName,
		CurrentStage = CurrentStage,
		DeliveryManager = DeliveryManager,
		ProjectName = ProjectName,
		ProjectTechnologyDomain = ProjectTechnologyDomain,
		StateID = StateID,
		VicePresident = VicePresident,
		BusinessDomainID = BusinessDomainID,
		ProjectManager = ProjectManager,
		ProjectID = ProjectID,
		Modified = Modified,
		Created = Created,
		ProjectContractType = ProjectContractType,
		BusinessDomain = BusinessDomain,
		hrPODProjectID = hrPODProjectID,
		HRPODProjectName = HRPODProjectName,
		ProjectContractTypeID = ProjectContractTypeID,
		IsSubProject = IsSubProject,
		CustomerID = CustomerID,
		ProjectTypeID = ProjectTypeID,
		SrProjectManager = SrProjectManager,
		SrPMName = SrPMName,
		{} = {}
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPProjectTechnologySelect
LKPProjectTechnologySelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPProjectTechnologyIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPProjectTechnologyIsMatch@Match,LKPProjectBillingTypeLKPTABLE lookup(LKPProjectTechnologyIsMatch@Match@ProjectBillingTypeID == LKPProjectBillingTypeLKPTABLE@ProjectBillingTypeID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPProjectBillingType
